creator: simond@irrelevant.org
text:
Here's a diff to the 1.2.3 patch which updates it to 1.2.4

diff -ruN squirrelmail.orig/Makefile squirrelmail/Makefile
--- squirrelmail.orig/Makefile	Fri Feb  1 12:13:52 2002
+++ squirrelmail/Makefile	Fri Feb  1 12:13:28 2002
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	squirrelmail
-PORTVERSION=	1.2.3
+PORTVERSION=	1.2.4
 CATEGORIES=	mail www
 MASTER_SITES=	${MASTER_SITE_SOURCEFORGE}
 MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	squirrelmail
diff -ruN squirrelmail.orig/distinfo squirrelmail/distinfo
--- squirrelmail.orig/distinfo	Fri Feb  1 12:13:58 2002
+++ squirrelmail/distinfo	Fri Feb  1 12:13:37 2002
@@ -1 +1 @@
-MD5 (squirrelmail-1.2.3.tar.bz2) = fd46072cf09887ccebd00329dae5e4de
+MD5 (squirrelmail-1.2.4.tar.bz2) = 2706674a50670fd5aeaa635705a397f5

-- 
Simon Dick					simond@irrelevant.org
"Why do I get this urge to go bowling everytime I see Tux?"
